bamboo_snooze.label: Panda-napping...
bamboo_snooze.prompt: A funny panda, eyes half-closed, gently rocking. A small bamboo shoot clutched loosely. Content and sleepy.

bamboo_ponder.label: Puzzling it out...
bamboo_ponder.prompt: A funny panda with furrowed brows, tapping its chin with a paw. A bamboo leaf spins above its head, deep in thought.

chatty_chuckle.label: Chatting cheerfully...
chatty_chuckle.prompt: A funny panda gesticulating with its paws, mouth open in a wide, happy grin. Expressive eyes sparkling, enthusiastically communicating.

dancing.label: 跳舞中...
dancing.prompt: Motif is moving rhythmically, swaying and grooving to an imaginary beat, with a joyful expression and fluid movements.

cheerful_chatting.label: Chatting cheerfully
cheerful_chatting.prompt: Motif is happily chatting with a bright and friendly demeanor, moving their hands expressively.
